/usr/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MinecraftServer.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MinecraftServer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MinecraftServer.dir/src/game/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MinecraftServer.dir/src/game/world.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MinecraftServer.dir/src/network/server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MinecraftServer.dir/src/network/tcpclient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MinecraftServer.dir/src/protocol/packet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MinecraftServer.dir/src/protocol/varint.cpp.o -o MinecraftServer
